item.text:
**Exploring repo modifications**

I need to modify a repo, but it’s in a read-only sandbox with no approvals allowed. This might be tricky since I can’t write via shell. I'm wondering if I could still use `apply_patch`, but that probably won't work given the read-only restriction. I should inspect the repo to see if a patch can still be provided. I also need to utilize my Spring Boot skills and check the AGENTS in the repo for detailed instructions. Time to read through the files and plan appropriately!
Using `spring-boot-engineer` because this is Spring Boot endpoint work.
